description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, finished in a glossy yellow color with distinctive Pac-Man 25th Anniversary branding on both side panels. The side panels feature colorful graphics of Pac-Man, ghosts, and the official logo, with a black top and base. The front of the cabinet houses a screen displaying the Pac-Man game maze, a red joystick, and three control buttons (one red, two white) arranged in a single-player layout. The control panel is black with a yellow front panel, and the cabinet has a slanted upper section typical of vintage arcade machines. The back panel is plain black, lacking any visible access doors or vents. The overall design is compact and visually striking, evoking nostalgia for classic arcade environments.
description: A yellow Pac-Man 25th Anniversary arcade cabinet with colorful side graphics, a black control panel featuring a joystick and buttons, and a screen displaying the Pac-Man game maze.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow panel with Pac-Man, ghosts, and the 25th Anniversary logo, as well as the angled black top and part of the control panel.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black panel with no visible graphics, controls, or access points.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with identical Pac-Man and ghost graphics and the same angled black top.
description_view_3: Front view showing the game screen with the Pac-Man maze, a red joystick, three control buttons, and the yellow front panel below the controls.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible black bezel around the screen area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick on the left and three buttons (one red, two white) arranged in a row to the right, on a black panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: None; the top section is plain black with no visible marquee or illuminated artwork.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature vibrant Pac-Man 25th Anniversary artwork, including Pac-Man, multiple colored ghosts, and the official logo, all set against a yellow background.
